titleStmt.title: SII 15.692: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 692. (B.K. No. 134 of 1926-27.) HUYILGŌḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the platform of the Kalamēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1484, Dundubhi, Pushya śu. 15, Saturday, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1563 A.D., January 9.

It records the restoration of the gift of land in favour of the god Mūlasthāna Kalinātha or Kallayyadēva of Hulagoḷa by Mutyapa, the Pārupatyagāra of the place, for the merit of Vīrappa-nāyaka. The various services to be maintained out of the income from the gift are enumerated in detail.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayā
bhyudeya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣa 1484 neya
duṁdubhi saṁ . puṣya śu 15 sthiravāra
sōmōparāga puṇyakāladoḷu
vīrapanāyakarige puṁ
ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu śrī nārāyaṇadēvara
hulagoḷa grāmada pārupatyagāra mu
tyapanu hulagoḷada mūlasthā
nada kallayyadēvarige pū¨rva
da māṁnyaviralāgi Ā mānyada grā
make kuḷa birāḍa
mūru hoṁnanū tattu
śrīkāra naḍadu baralāgi me
dhyadali gauḍugaḷu Anitavāgi
haṇakāsa koḷalāgi dēvarige A
mṛtapaḍi dīpārādhana yillada
saṁmaṁdha . naṁma voḍeya vīrappa
nāyakarige puṁṇyavāgabēkeṁdu
Ā kallayyadēvara māṁnyakke prā
ku pramāṇu kuḷa birāḍa
muru honna grāmakke tettu
Ā kalinātha dēvarige A mā
nyada huṭida phaladalli dēva
ra śrīkāra naḍesuva vivara . di
na 1 kke Akki pa 1 keṇika
pa 1 tupa 3 . naṁdādīpti 1 A
laṁkāradīpti 10 I Āhārada
lli naḍasiyeṁdu Ā mūla
stānada kalināthadēvarige sa
¨rvvabādha parihāravāgi koṭa
mānya yidakke Avanānō¨rvva
tapidare kāśiyali gōU muṁ
tāgi mātāpitravadhaya māḍi
da samāna . śivācāra kulācā
rakke hoṟagū Eṁdu mutya
panu hākikoṭa śilā
śāsanā . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.692 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
